company.name: Tabreed Thermal Control
company.description: Tabreed Thermal Control specializes in providing innovative Refrigeration and HVAC solutions that optimize equipment operation and control energy costs. The company offers fully licensed expertise in Refrigeration, HVAC, and Automation Control systems, with a strong focus on sustainable CO2 refrigeration technology.
company.mission: To provide innovative, energy-efficient, and environmentally friendly Refrigeration and HVAC solutions while delivering excellent workmanship and customer service.

services.title: Refrigeration & HVAC Service & Repair
services.description: Fast and reliable repair services for scheduled maintenance and emergency breakdowns to minimize downtime.

services.title: Retrofit Projects
services.description: Equipment retrofits and upgrades for regulatory compliance, energy savings, and enhanced operational control.

services.title: Automation & Integration
services.description: Integration of Building Automation Systems (BAS), VFDs, VAV systems, and advanced refrigeration controls for improved monitoring and efficiency.

services.title: Preventative Maintenance
services.description: Customized preventative maintenance programs designed to maximize efficiency and extend equipment lifespan.

benefits.name: Environmentally Friendly
benefits.description: CO2 Refrigeration has a global warming potential of 1, making it one of the most sustainable refrigerants available.

benefits.name: Versatile
benefits.description: Suitable for commercial refrigeration, industrial refrigeration, and HVAC applications while integrating with existing systems.

benefits.name: Cost Effective
benefits.description: Provides long-term cost savings through improved energy efficiency and reduced maintenance requirements.

benefits.name: Energy Efficient
benefits.description: Can reduce energy consumption by up to 10% compared to traditional refrigerants.

testimonials.author: Wadi Muhammad
testimonials.review: Very professional and friendly service. Great HVAC and refrigeration expertise.

testimonials.author: Rosedale Sports Bar
testimonials.review: Fantastic service, honest diagnostics, and reliable repairs. Highly recommended.

testimonials.author: Dien Woudenberg
testimonials.review: Highly skilled, knowledgeable, trustworthy, and reasonably priced HVAC service.

testimonials.author: Ancaster Ice Cream Parlour
testimonials.review: Excellent support with soft serve machine repairs, even after business hours.

blog_topics.title: Cutting Costs & Carbon Footprints with CO2 Solutions
